defaultHint: If this is your first login, check the logs for the default password.

recovery.title: Recovery Code Login
recovery.subtitle: Lost access to your authenticator app? Use a recovery code to log in.
recovery.savedWarning: If lost, account access cannot be restored through normal means.
recovery.acknowledge: I have saved my recovery codes
recovery.totpDisableWarning: Using a recovery code will disable two-factor authentication.

setup.title: Set Up Account
setup.subtitle: Create the account used to manage AstrBot
setup.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

totp.title: Complete TOTP Setup
totp.subtitle: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app to enable two-factor authentication.
totp.step2Hint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy) and enter the code below.
totp.verifyError: Unable to verify the code. Enter the latest code from your authenticator app.
totp.disableError: Unable to disable TOTP. Please try again.

validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordDigit: Password must include at least one number
